hero.title: Your phone calls. Handled.
hero.subtitle: AI agents that answer, qualify, and book — so you never miss a call again
hero.trustLine: Works with your existing number · No contracts · 14-day free trial

simulator.thatCallTook: That call took {seconds} seconds. Your AI handles this 24/7.
simulator.readySubtext: Start free — 5 minute setup. No credit card · 14-day trial
simulator.script0Line0: Thanks for calling! How can I help you today?
simulator.script0Line1: Yeah hi, I've got a leak under my kitchen sink.
simulator.script0Line2: I can help with that. Can I get your name?
simulator.script0Line4: Thanks Mike. Best number to reach you?
simulator.script0Line8: Is this an active leak or a slow drip?
simulator.script0Line9: Slow drip, but it's getting worse.
simulator.script0Line10: Got it. I have tomorrow at 10 AM or Thursday at 2 PM available.
simulator.script0Line12: Perfect! You're booked for tomorrow at 10 AM at 742 Elm St. I'll send a text confirmation right now.
simulator.script0Detail3: Issue: Kitchen sink leak — slow drip
simulator.script1Line0: Good morning, Maple Street Dental! This is Alex. How can I help?
simulator.script1Line1: Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning.
simulator.script1Line2: Of course! Are you an existing patient?
simulator.script1Line4: Welcome back, Sarah! Do you prefer mornings or afternoons?
simulator.script1Line6: I have Tuesday at 9 AM or Wednesday at 10:30 with Dr. Martinez.
simulator.script1Line8: Booked! Tuesday at 9 AM with Dr. Martinez. You'll get a reminder on Monday.
simulator.script1Line10: See you Tuesday, Sarah! Have a great day.
simulator.script2Line0: Hi, is this James? This is Emma from Summit Roofing.
simulator.script2Line2: You submitted a request on our website about 2 minutes ago regarding roof damage. I wanted to follow up right away.
simulator.script2Line3: Oh right, yeah. We had storm damage last week.
simulator.script2Line4: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you describe what you're seeing?
simulator.script2Line5: There are missing shingles on the south side of the house.
simulator.script2Line6: That definitely needs attention. We can send an estimator out tomorrow at 3 PM — would that work?
simulator.script2Line8: Great. Have you started an insurance claim yet?
simulator.script2Line10: No worries — our estimator can help document everything for your insurance claim while they're there.
simulator.script2Line12: Sending you a confirmation text now. See you tomorrow at 3, James!
simulator.script2Detail2: Issue: Storm damage — missing shingles, south side

trust.description: Enterprise-grade security and reliability. Start free — no credit card required.

demoPage.title: Experience Recall Touch
demoPage.subtitle: Talk to an AI agent that handles real calls. Right now.
demoPage.greeting: Hi! I'm the Recall Touch agent. I can help with scheduling, pricing, callbacks, or anything else. What do you need?
demoPage.voiceStyleHelp: Choose Professional, Friendly, or Concise in the chat header above.
demoPage.whatJustHappenedDesc: The agent captured the conversation and would:
demoPage.bullet1: Extract name, request type, and next step
demoPage.bullet2: Queue a callback or appointment if needed
demoPage.bullet3: Send you a summary and follow-up
demoPage.voiceWidgetHint: Voice: click the round widget in the corner to talk.
demoPage.watchSampleCallDesc: Starts automatically when this section loads, then shows the captured result.
demoPage.metaDescription: Talk to your AI. Right now. Same AI that handles real calls.

contactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with Recall Touch. Sales, enterprise, and technical support. Response within 4 hours.
contactPage.heading: Get in touch
contactPage.subheading: Whether you're evaluating Recall Touch for your team or need technical support, the team is here to help.
contactPage.salesEnterpriseDesc: Talk to the team about Team plans, custom compliance, and volume pricing.
contactPage.supportDesc: Need help with your account, technical issues, or billing?

productPage.metaDescription: One platform for every phone interaction — inbound calls, outbound campaigns, SMS, scheduling, lead capture, and analytics.
productPage.heading: One platform. Every phone interaction.
productPage.subheading: Handle every call, text, and follow-up. Book appointments. Qualify leads. See everything in one dashboard.
productPage.answersEveryCallDesc: Your AI picks up on the first ring, 24/7/365. No voicemail. No hold music. Natural conversational voice handles everything from simple questions to complex scheduling. Whether it's 2 AM or your busiest hour, every caller gets the same professional experience.
productPage.outboundDesc: New web lead? Your AI calls back within 60 seconds. Appointment tomorrow? Confirmation call the evening before. No-show? Automatic reschedule. Customer hasn't returned in 6 months? Reactivation follow-up. Your AI follows up so your team handles work that requires a human.
productPage.agentsDesc: Build your AI agent without code. Start from 20+ templates or from scratch. Choose voice, personality, greeting, knowledge base, business rules. Test with a real call before going live. Edit anytime — changes are instant.
productPage.leadsDesc: Every call auto-extracts name, phone, address, what they need, urgency. Each lead scored 0-100 on intent signals. Instant text + email notification. No more sticky notes or forgotten follow-ups.
productPage.appointmentsDesc: Checks Google Calendar or Outlook in real-time, offers available slots, books, confirms via text. Sends reminders before. Reschedules no-shows automatically. Calendar stays full without you lifting a finger.
productPage.messagingDesc: Two-way SMS from your business number. Auto-confirmations after bookings. Follow-up sequences for leads who didn't convert. Review requests after appointments. One inbox for all conversations.
productPage.insightsDesc: Call volume, answer rate, lead conversion, appointment completion, revenue recovered. Usage meter shows minutes vs plan. Monthly ROI statement: your AI captured X leads, booked Y appointments worth $Z. Starter plan: $297. ROI: clear.
productPage.complianceDesc: Every call recorded and transcribed. HIPAA mode available. Retention 30-365 days. Full audit trail. Data export. Industry-ready documentation.
productPage.forBusinessesDesc: Solo operators to growing teams. Answer every call, book appointments, capture leads, and follow up — without hiring a front desk.
productPage.forTeamsDesc: Multi-location, agencies, and distributed teams. One platform, one standard. Consistent answers and full visibility.
productPage.forDevelopersDesc: API, webhooks, and integrations. Build Recall Touch into your stack and keep every conversation documented.
productPage.complianceBody: Every call is recorded and transcribed. Governed records, audit trail, and chain of custody. HIPAA mode available. Retention 30–365 days. Data export and industry-ready documentation. When your industry requires it, Recall Touch is built for it.
productPage.complianceBullets: Recording & transcription · HIPAA option · Retention 30–365 days · Audit trail
productPage.ctaSubtext: Recall Touch starts at $297/month and takes 5 minutes to set up.
productPage.ctaHeading: Ready to handle every call, text, and follow-up automatically?
productPage.ctaBody: Start in under 60 seconds. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: AI phone system that answers, qualifies, and books calls for your business 24/7.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent plans that scale with your revenue.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For solo operators who want AI to answer every call.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing teams that need reliable coverage and follow-up.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: For teams that run on scheduled revenue and complex pipelines.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations that need custom routing, security, and SLAs.

faq.title: Pricing questions
faq.trial: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.trialAnswer: Yes — all non-Enterprise plans include a 14-day free trial.
faq.overage: What happens if I go over my minutes?
faq.overageAnswer: We simply bill overage at your plan’s per-minute rate with no penalties.
faq.cancelAnswer: Yes — you can cancel or change plans at any time from the billing settings.

errors.validation: The data you submitted is invalid. Please check the fields and try again.
